evals.prompt: Audit claude.ai — just SEO technical and structured data categories
evals.expected_output: A report file named {date}-audit-claude-ai.md covering SEO Technical and Structured Data categories, with deterministic scores, letter grades, and a prioritised fix list. Should include robots.txt analysis, sitemap check, HTTPS verification, JSON-LD validation, and Core Web Vitals from Lighthouse.

evals.prompt: Run a full website audit on anthropic.com
evals.expected_output: A comprehensive report file covering all 5 categories (AEO, GEO, SEO Technical, SEO On-Page, Structured Data) plus indexability and AI bot policy analysis. Should crawl multiple pages, run Lighthouse, check Perplexity citations if API key available, and produce a scored report with fix priorities.

evals.prompt: Compare docs.anthropic.com vs platform.openai.com — focus on AEO and GEO
evals.expected_output: A comparison report file with side-by-side scores for AEO and GEO, category-by-category analysis of how each documentation site performs for answer engine and generative engine optimisation, and top 3 fixes per site.
